summary: Re-test after iteration_2 fixes: Both critical bugs VERIFIED FIXED. (1) Talk.js race condition - stream-token guard + AbortController prevents crash when clicking 'New Chat' during streaming. (2) Mobile More button - z-index raised to 10000, now clickable. All 5 regression tests passed. 9/9 tests successful.

backend_issues.note: Backend testing skipped per request (frontend-only re-test)

passed_tests: ✅ FIX VERIFY 1 (CRITICAL): Talk race condition fixed - clicked 'New Chat' while streaming, no crash, conversation reset cleanly, composer remains usable, fresh message streams correctly
✅ FIX VERIFY 2 (HIGH): Mobile More button fixed - z-index 10000 confirmed, button clickable, secondary nav sheet opens with all items (Routines, Connected Accounts, Devices, Settings)
✅ REGRESSION 1: Talk normal flow - message sent, assistant reply streamed correctly without issues
✅ REGRESSION 2: Action Queue approve - pending action approved successfully, success toast displayed
✅ REGRESSION 3: Memory add - memory content saved successfully via add button flow
✅ REGRESSION 4: Files upload - .txt file uploaded via hidden input, processed and displayed with cards
✅ REGRESSION 5: Today dashboard - demo login lands on dashboard with briefing card and Action Queue preview
✅ Mobile header menu button - also opens secondary nav sheet correctly
✅ No page errors or console errors detected during entire test suite

detailed_notes.fix_1_implementation: Talk.js now uses streamTokenRef (line 34) and abortRef (line 35). Each stream gets a unique token (line 62), and callbacks check if token is stale (line 71). newChat() calls cancelStream() which increments token and aborts fetch (lines 112-117, 120). This prevents stale callbacks from accessing cleared message array.
detailed_notes.fix_2_implementation: AppShell.js bottom tab bar z-index raised to 10000 (line 154), above the Emergent badge's 9999. More button now receives pointer events correctly on mobile.
detailed_notes.streaming_behavior: LLM streaming works smoothly, responses appear within 2-8 seconds. Stream cancellation is clean with no lingering callbacks.
detailed_notes.mobile_responsive: Mobile viewport (390x844) tested - bottom tab bar, More button, and header menu all working correctly.
detailed_notes.demo_account: Demo login (demo@kaelra.ai / kaelra) works instantly via auth-demo-login-button, rich Hetul account data present.
detailed_notes.no_regressions: All previously working features remain functional after the fixes.
